name: Mike Holstein
awards: Lifetime Achievement Award, Regional Business Excellence Award
bio: Mike founded MH Construction and set the original operating standard for integrity, quality, and partnership-driven service. His legacy continues to shape how the company approaches every client relationship: listen first, execute with pride, and stand behind the work.
careerHighlights: Founded MH Construction on integrity, quality, and partnership principles.
Established the original service model that shaped long-term client trust.
Built a practical leadership standard centered on accountability and pride.
Created a legacy that continues to guide mission-focused execution.
funFact: Mike launched MH from a pickup and toolbox, proving that consistency builds legacy.
